name: What kind of website content actually gets picked up in voice search for lawyers?
description: Question-style pages with direct answers, clear contact details, and local business information are the most voice-search friendly.

mainEntity.name: What kind of website content actually gets picked up in voice search for lawyers?

acceptedAnswer.text: You need pages that match spoken, question-based searches, plus clear local business details. Voice assistants rely heavily on concise answers, business hours, contact info, and structured page sections that are easy to parse.
acceptedAnswer.description: Question-style pages with direct answers, clear contact details, and local business information are the most voice-search friendly.
